prompt: 在单个HTML文件中创建一个销售仪表板。在顶部显示4个统计卡片：Total Revenue ($45,230)、Orders (342)、Customers (156)、Conversion Rate (3.2%)。下方，使用彩色div条的简单条形图显示1月至6月的月度销售额（数值：5200、6800、4900、7200、8100、6500）。下方包含一个表格，列出前5个产品（name、units sold、revenue）。干净的白色设计，带有蓝色点缀。

test_cases.name: The four KPI cards expose exact prompt values for revenue, orders, customers, and conversion rate

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').toLowerCase(); return /45,?230/.test(t) && /342/.test(t) && /156/.test(t) && /3\.2%/.test(t);})()

test_cases.name: Four stat cards show the exact prompt values without zero placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>20&&r.height>10;};const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const blocks=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,article,div,li')].filter(visible).map(el=>norm(el.innerText||el.textContent||'')).filter(t=>t.length>0&&t.length<600);const hasPair=(label,rx)=>blocks.some(t=>new RegExp(label,'i').test(t)&&rx.test(t));return hasPair('total\\s+revenue|revenue',/\$?\s*45,?230\b/)&&hasPair('orders?',/\b342\b/)&&hasPair('customers?',/\b156\b/)&&hasPair('conversion',/\b3\.2\s*%/)&&!blocks.some(t=>/(total\s+revenue|orders?|customers?|conversion)/i.test(t)&&/\$\s*0\b|\b0%\b|:\s*0\b/.test(t));})()

test_cases.name: Monthly Jan-Jun sales use six visible colored div bars with value-scaled heights

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=="none"&&s.visibility!=="hidden"&&parseFloat(s.opacity||"1")>0&&r.width>=4&&r.height>=8;};function norm(s){return (s||"").toString().replace(/\s+/g," ").trim();}const months=["jan","feb","mar","apr","may","jun"];const values=["5200","6800","4900","7200","8100","6500"];function hasDigit(s){return (s||"").toString().split("").some(ch=>ch>="0"&&ch<="9");}const sections=[...document.querySelectorAll("section,article,main,div")].filter(visible).map(el=>{return {el:el,text:norm(el.innerText||el.textContent||"")};}).filter(x=>{const low=x.text.toLowerCase();return x.text.length<3000&&(months.every(m=>low.includes(m))||low.includes("monthly sales")||low.includes("sales performance"));}).sort((a,b)=>a.text.length-b.text.length);for(const obj of sections){const el=obj.el;const bars=[...el.querySelectorAll("div")].filter(d=>visible(d)).map(d=>{const r=d.getBoundingClientRect();const meta=norm([d.getAttribute("aria-label"),d.getAttribute("title"),d.getAttribute("data-value"),d.style.height,d.className,d.textContent].join(" "));const bg=getComputedStyle(d).backgroundColor.toLowerCase();return {w:r.width,h:r.height,meta:meta,low:meta.toLowerCase(),bg:bg};}).filter(x=>(x.low.includes("bar")||x.low.includes("height")||x.low.includes("%")||hasDigit(x.meta))&&x.h>12&&x.w>3);if(bars.length<6)continue;const labels=[...el.querySelectorAll("*")].filter(visible).map(n=>norm(n.innerText||n.textContent||"").toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean);if(!months.every(m=>labels.some(t=>t===m||t.includes(m))))continue;const text=el.innerText||el.textContent||"";const compact=text.replaceAll(",","");const numericHits=values.filter(v=>compact.includes(v)).length;const hs=bars.slice(0,12).map(x=>x.h);const variation=Math.max(...hs)-Math.min(...hs);const hasColored=bars.some(x=>!x.bg.includes("255, 255, 255")&&!x.bg.includes("transparent"));const metaText=bars.map(x=>x.meta.replaceAll(",","")).join(" ");const hasKeyValues=metaText.includes("5200")||metaText.includes("8100");if(variation>=20&&hasColored&&(numericHits>=3||hasKeyValues))return true;}return false;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const kpi=/(124,?500|45,?200|42\.3|3m\s*24s|page views|unique visitors|bounce|session)/.test(t); const sources=/(direct|organic|social|referral|35%|28%|22%|15%)/.test(t); const geo=/(country|countries|heatmap|bar|geographic|usa|china|germany|uk)/.test(t); const chart=document.querySelectorAll('svg,canvas,path,polyline,rect,circle').length>=4; return kpi&&sources&&geo&&chart;})()

prompt: 构建一个IoT智能家居仪表盘，使用单个HTML文件。平面图视图（房屋的SVG绘图，包含各个房间）。每个房间显示：温度传感器读数、灯光状态（开/关切换）、湿度。侧边栏：设备列表（8个设备：恒温器、3个灯光、2个摄像头、门铃、智能锁）及状态指示器。点击设备以切换其状态（视觉反馈：绿色=开启，灰色=关闭）。实时模拟：温度每5秒波动±0.5。当温度超过28°C时显示警告横幅。能耗图表（24小时柱状图）。控制项：主"全部关灯"按钮、温度阈值滑块。深色主题配青色强调色。将设备状态存储在localStorage中。

test_cases.name: Device list
Smart-home sensors, device list, controls, and floor-plan surface are present

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=((document.body.innerText||'')+' '+(document.documentElement.innerHTML||'')).toLowerCase();const sensor=(/temperature|temp|°c|℃/.test(t)&&/humidity|%/.test(t)&&/light|on|off/.test(t));const devices=[/thermostat/,/light/,/camera/,/doorbell/,/lock/].filter(rx=>rx.test(t)).length;const controls=[/all lights off/,/threshold|slider/,/energy|24[- ]?hour|chart/,/alert|28/.test(t)].filter(Boolean).length;const floor=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg rect,svg text,canvas').length>=8;return sensor&&devices>=5&&controls>=3&&floor;})()

(()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||'').match(/ \d{1,2}(?:\.\d)?\s*°?c /gi)||[]; return t.join('|')!==window.__r26_temp_before && t.length>=2;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r26_alert_before=(document.body.innerText||''); return true;})()

(()=>{const range=document.querySelector('input[type=range]'); if(!range) return false; range.value='18'; range.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); range.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;})()
(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); return text!==window.__r26_alert_before && /alert|warning|threshold|overheat|too hot|28/.test(text);})()

(()=>{const parse=(v)=>{try{return JSON.parse(v)}catch(e){return v}};const isObj=(x)=>!!x&&typeof x==='object'&&!Array.isArray(x);const roots=[];for(let i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){roots.push(parse(localStorage.getItem(localStorage.key(i))));}const read=(obj,names)=>{if(!isObj(obj))return undefined;for(const k of Object.keys(obj)){const low=String(k).toLowerCase();if(names.includes(low))return obj[k];}return undefined;};const num=(v)=>{if(typeof v==='number')return v;if(typeof v==='string'&&v.trim()!==''&&!Number.isNaN(Number(v)))return Number(v);return NaN;};const hasDate=(obj)=>{if(!isObj(obj))return false;for(const k of Object.keys(obj)){const low=String(k).toLowerCase();if((low.includes('date')||low.includes('day'))&&String(obj[k]).length>=6)return true;}return false;};const hasMet=(obj)=>{if(!isObj(obj))return false;for(const k of Object.keys(obj)){const low=String(k).toLowerCase();if(low==='met'||low==='goalmet'||low==='complete'||low==='completed'||low==='achieved'||low==='done'||low.includes('met')||low.includes('achiev')||low.includes('complete')){const v=obj[k];if(typeof v==='boolean')return true;const s=String(v).toLowerCase();if(s==='true'||s==='false')return true;}}return false;};const okState=(obj)=>{if(!isObj(obj))return false;const current=num(read(obj,['current','count','intake','glasses','cups']));const goal=num(read(obj,['goal','dailygoal','target']));const history=read(obj,['history','days','records','log']);if(!(current===1&&goal===8&&Array.isArray(history)&&history.length>=1))return false;return history.some(day=>hasDate(day)&&hasMet(day));};const walk=(x,depth)=>{if(depth>4)return false;if(okState(x))return true;if(Array.isArray(x))return x.some(y=>walk(y,depth+1));if(isObj(x))return Object.values(x).some(y=>walk(y,depth+1));return false;};return roots.some(x=>walk(x,0));})()

test_cases.name: Accessibility basics
Added expense appears in the transaction list, updates totals, and persists

steps.expression: (async()=>{const fire=(el,t)=>el&&el.dispatchEvent(new Event(t,{bubbles:true}));try{localStorage.clear();}catch(e){}const visible=e=>!!e&&e.offsetParent!==null;const text=()=>document.body.innerText.toLowerCase();const fields=[...document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea,select')].filter(visible);const meta=e=>((e.placeholder||'')+' '+(e.name||'')+' '+(e.id||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(e.parentElement?.innerText||'')).toLowerCase();const amount=fields.find(e=>e.type==='number'||/amount|金额|cost|price/.test(meta(e)));if(!amount)return false;amount.value='37.42';fire(amount,'input');fire(amount,'change');const desc=fields.find(e=>(e.tagName==='TEXTAREA'||e.type==='text'||!e.type)&&e!==amount&&!/date/.test(meta(e)));if(desc){desc.value='probe-expense-zeta';fire(desc,'input');fire(desc,'change');}const sel=fields.find(e=>e.tagName==='SELECT');if(sel){const opt=[...sel.options].find(o=>/food/i.test(o.textContent||''))||sel.options[1];if(opt)sel.value=opt.value;fire(sel,'input');fire(sel,'change');}const date=fields.find(e=>e.type==='date'||/date/.test(meta(e)));if(date){date.value='2026-04-26';fire(date,'input');fire(date,'change');}const before=text();const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=button],input[type=submit]')].filter(visible).find(b=>/add|save|添加|新增|记录/i.test(b.textContent||b.value||''));if(!btn)return false;btn.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,600));const body=text();const stored=(()=>{try{return JSON.stringify(localStorage).toLowerCase();}catch(e){return '';}})();return body!==before&&body.includes('probe-expense-zeta')&&body.includes('37.42')&&/food|total|spent|合计|总/.test(body)&&(stored.includes('probe-expense-zeta')||stored.includes('37.42'));})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();const hasInputs=document.querySelectorAll('input[type=time]').length>=2&&document.querySelectorAll('textarea').length>=1;const weeklyBars=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect,rect').length>=7&&/weekly|last 7|7 days/.test(text);const monthlyLine=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,path,polyline,line').length>=3&&/30[- ]day|monthly|quality trend/.test(text);const exportCsv=/export/.test(text)&&/csv/.test(text);return hasInputs&&weeklyBars&&monthlyLine&&exportCsv;})()

test_cases.name: Time pickers (bedtime/wake-up)
Recording 23:00 to 06:30 updates calculated average sleep duration

steps.expression: (async()=>{const visible=e=>e&&getComputedStyle(e).display!=='none'&&getComputedStyle(e).visibility!=='hidden';const set=(el,val)=>{el.value=val;el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));};const times=[...document.querySelectorAll('input[type=time]')].filter(visible);if(times.length<2)return false;set(times[0],'23:00');set(times[1],'06:30');const ranges=[...document.querySelectorAll('input[type=range]')].filter(visible);if(ranges[0])set(ranges[0],'4');const ta=document.querySelector('textarea');if(ta)set(ta,'probe sleep note');const before=document.body.innerText;const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],input[type=submit]')].find(e=>/save|add|record|记录|添加/i.test((e.innerText||e.value||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')));if(!btn)return false;btn.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,700));const after=document.body.innerText;const combined=(after+' '+JSON.stringify({...localStorage})).toLowerCase();return after!==before&&/7\.5|7:30|7h\s*30|7\.50|7 hours|avg duration|average duration|sleep/.test(combined)&&/23:00|06:30|probe sleep/.test(combined);})()

test_cases.name: Accessibility basics
Creating an itinerary preserves date, time, location, activity, and transport in timeline or storage

steps.expression: async()=>{const wait=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&Number(s.opacity||1)>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const label=el=>((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.value||el.placeholder||el.title||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(el.name||'')+' '+(el.id||'')+' '+(el.className||'')).toLowerCase();const setVal=(el,val)=>{if(!el)return false;el.focus();if(el.tagName==='SELECT'){const opt=[...el.options].find(o=>/subway|taxi|walk|plane/i.test(o.textContent||o.value))||el.options[1];if(opt)el.value=opt.value;}else if(el.isContentEditable){el.textContent=val;}else{el.value=val;}el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;};const fields=[...document.querySelectorAll('input,select,textarea,[contenteditable=true]')].filter(visible);const date=fields.find(e=>e.type==='date'||/date/.test(label(e)));const time=fields.find(e=>e.type==='time'||/time/.test(label(e)));const loc=fields.find(e=>/location|place|destination/.test(label(e)));const act=fields.find(e=>/activity|content|details|note/.test(label(e)))||fields.find(e=>e.tagName==='TEXTAREA');const sel=fields.find(e=>e.tagName==='SELECT'||/transport/.test(label(e)));const before=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ');const ok=[setVal(date,'2026-05-20'),setVal(time,'09:30'),setVal(loc,'Kyoto Station'),setVal(act,'Temple walk'),setVal(sel,'subway')].filter(Boolean).length>=4;const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],input[type=submit],a')].filter(visible).find(e=>/add|create|save|itinerary/i.test(label(e)));if(btn)btn.click();await wait(600);const after=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ');let stored='';try{stored=Object.values(localStorage).join(' ');}catch(e){}return ok&&(/Kyoto Station|Temple walk|09:30|2026/.test(after+stored))&&after!==before;}

test_cases.name: Input fields for date/time/location
Creating an itinerary writes date, time, location, activity, and transport into the timeline

steps.expression: (async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const meta=el=>[(el.placeholder||''),(el.name||''),(el.id||''),(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''),...(el.labels?[...el.labels].map(l=>l.innerText||''):[])].join(' ').toLowerCase();const fill=(el,val)=>{if(!el)return false;el.focus();el.value=String(val);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;};const location='Kyoto Station';const activity='Temple walk';const date='2026-05-02';const time='14:00';const before=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const fields=[...document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea,select')].filter(visible);const textInputs=fields.filter(el=>!['date','time','hidden','checkbox','radio','submit','button'].includes((el.type||'text').toLowerCase()));const dateInput=fields.find(el=>(el.type||'').toLowerCase()==='date')||textInputs.find(el=>/date|day/.test(meta(el)));const timeInput=fields.find(el=>(el.type||'').toLowerCase()==='time')||textInputs.find(el=>/time|hour/.test(meta(el)));const locationInput=textInputs.find(el=>/location|place|destination|where/.test(meta(el)))||textInputs[0];const activityInput=textInputs.find(el=>/activity|content|title|plan|event|todo|description/.test(meta(el))&&el!==locationInput)||fields.find(el=>el.tagName==='TEXTAREA')||textInputs[1];const ok=fill(dateInput,date)&&fill(timeInput,time)&&fill(locationInput,location)&&fill(activityInput,activity);const transportSelect=fields.find(el=>el.tagName==='SELECT'&&/transport|method|travel/.test(meta(el)))||fields.find(el=>el.tagName==='SELECT');if(transportSelect){const opt=[...transportSelect.options].find(o=>/taxi/i.test(o.textContent||o.value))||[...transportSelect.options].find(o=>/walk|subway|plane/i.test(o.textContent||o.value));if(opt){transportSelect.value=opt.value;transportSelect.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}}const add=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a,input[type=submit],input[type=button]')].filter(visible).find(el=>/add|save|create|submit|itinerary|plan/i.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.value||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')));if(add) add.click();await sleep(900);const body=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ');let stored='';try{for(let i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){const k=localStorage.key(i);stored+=' '+k+' '+localStorage.getItem(k);}}catch(e){}const combined=body+' '+stored;const timeline=/timeline|itinerary|day|activity|transport|total/i.test(combined)&&(/Kyoto Station/.test(combined)&&/Temple walk/.test(combined));const transport=/taxi|walk|subway|plane/i.test(combined);return ok&&timeline&&transport&&body!==before&&!/undefined|nan|\[object object\]/i.test(body);})()

test_cases.name: Accessibility basics
Custom 12.5% tip on an 80 bill split by 4 updates total and per-person amounts

steps.expression: (async()=>{const fire=(el,t)=>el&&el.dispatchEvent(new Event(t,{bubbles:true}));const visible=e=>{if(!e)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(e),r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>=0&&r.height>=0;};const info=e=>((e.placeholder||'')+' '+(e.name||'')+' '+(e.id||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+((e.closest('label,div,section,form')||e.parentElement||{}).innerText||'')).toLowerCase();const inputs=[...document.querySelectorAll('input')].filter(visible);const bill=inputs.find(e=>/bill|amount|total|账单|金额/i.test(info(e)))||inputs[0];const people=inputs.find(e=>/people|person|split|人数|guests/i.test(info(e)))||inputs[2]||inputs[1];const tipInput=inputs.find(e=>/custom|tip|percent|%|小费/i.test(info(e))&&e!==bill&&e!==people)||inputs.find(e=>e!==bill&&e!==people);if(!bill||!people||!tipInput)return false;bill.value='80';fire(bill,'input');fire(bill,'change');tipInput.value='12.5';fire(tipInput,'input');fire(tipInput,'change');people.value='4';fire(people,'input');fire(people,'change');await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,450));const text=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/,/g,'');return /90(?:\.00)?\b/.test(text)&&/22\.5(?:0)?\b/.test(text)&&(/tip|total|person|each|per/i.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Bill, 25% tip, and 5-person split update exact totals and reset clears them

steps.expression: (async()=>{const fire=(el,t)=>el&&el.dispatchEvent(new Event(t,{bubbles:true}));const inputs=[...document.querySelectorAll('input')];const info=e=>((e.placeholder||'')+' '+(e.name||'')+' '+(e.id||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(e.parentElement?.innerText||''));const bill=inputs.find(e=>/bill|amount/i.test(info(e)))||inputs[0];const people=inputs.find(e=>/people|person|split/i.test(info(e)))||inputs[2]||inputs[1];if(!bill||!people)return false;bill.value='250';fire(bill,'input');fire(bill,'change');const tipBtn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=button]')].find(b=>/25\s*%/.test(b.textContent||b.value||''));const tipInput=inputs.find(e=>/tip/i.test(info(e))&&e!==bill&&e!==people);if(tipBtn)tipBtn.click();else if(tipInput){tipInput.value='25';fire(tipInput,'input');fire(tipInput,'change');}people.value='5';fire(people,'input');fire(people,'change');await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,400));const before=document.body.innerText.replace(/,/g,'');const reset=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=button]')].find(b=>/reset|clear/i.test(b.textContent||b.value||''));if(!/62\.5|62\.50/.test(before)||!/312\.5|312\.50/.test(before))return false;if(!reset)return false;reset.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300));const after=document.body.innerText.replace(/,/g,'');return after!==before&&!/312\.5|312\.50/.test(after);})()

prompt: 创建一个房贷计算器, 单个HTML文件。输入: 房屋总价(万元), 首付比例(滑块20%-80%), 贷款年限(下拉: 10/15/20/25/30年), 利率(默认4.2%, 可修改)。自动计算: 贷款总额, 月供(等额本息和等额本金两种方式Tab切换), 支付利息总额, 还款总额。展示还款时间表(表格: 期数/月供/本金/利息/剩余)前12期, 可展开查看全部。饼图: 本金vs利息比例。折线图: 每月本金和利息随时间变化。所有输入实时联动计算。专业金融蓝色主题。

test_cases.name: 输入字段
月供显示
Repayment schedule shows the prompted first 12 periods with loan terms and methods

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').toLowerCase();const rows=document.querySelectorAll('table tr, tbody tr').length;const hasAllTerms=['10','15','20','25','30'].every(x=>t.includes(x));const methods=(/equal\s+principal/.test(t)||/等额本金/.test(t))&&(/equal\s+principal.*interest|equal p\s*&\s*i|等额本息|principal\s*&\s*interest/.test(t)||/interest/.test(t));const inputs=document.querySelectorAll('input,select').length>=4;return rows>=12&&rows<=20&&hasAllTerms&&methods&&inputs&&!/\[object Object\]| undefined | NaN /i.test(t);})()

test_cases.name: Equal Principal schedule uses flat principal with declining payments

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const meta=el=>[el.placeholder||'',el.name||'',el.id||'',el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',el.labels&&el.labels[0]?el.labels[0].innerText:'',el.closest('label')?el.closest('label').innerText:''].join(' ').toLowerCase();const fill=(el,val)=>{if(!el)return false;el.focus();el.value=String(val);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;};const inputs=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input'));const numeric=inputs.filter(el=>!['range','hidden','checkbox','radio','button','submit'].includes((el.type||'text').toLowerCase()));const price=numeric.find(el=>/price|house|total|房/.test(meta(el)))||numeric[0];const rate=numeric.find(el=>el!==price&&/rate|interest|利率/.test(meta(el)))||numeric.find(el=>el!==price);const down=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type=range]')).find(el=>/down|首付/.test(meta(el)))||document.querySelector('input[type=range]');const term=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('select')).find(el=>/term|year|期限/.test(meta(el)))||document.querySelector('select');fill(price,2000000);fill(rate,4.2);fill(down,30);if(term){const opt=Array.from(term.options||[]).find(o=>String(o.value).includes('30')||(o.textContent||'').includes('30'));if(opt){term.value=opt.value;term.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));term.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}}const target=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],label,a')).filter(visible).find(el=>{const txt=((el.innerText||el.textContent||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')).toLowerCase();return (/等额本金/.test(txt)&&!/等额本息/.test(txt))||(/equal\s+principal/.test(txt)&&!/interest|p\s*&\s*i/.test(txt));});if(!target)return false;target.click();return true;})()

(()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const parseNum=s=>{s=String(s||'').replace(/,/g,'');const m=s.match(/-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?/);return m?parseFloat(m[0]):NaN;};const rows=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr,tr')).filter(visible).map(tr=>Array.from(tr.children).map(td=>parseNum(td.innerText||td.textContent||''))).filter(nums=>nums.filter(Number.isFinite).length>=5).map(nums=>nums.slice(-4)).slice(0,5);if(rows.length<4)return false;const pays=rows.map(r=>r[0]),principals=rows.map(r=>r[1]),rems=rows.map(r=>r[3]);const avg=principals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/principals.length;const principalFlat=principals.every(x=>Math.abs(x-avg)<=Math.max(5,avg*0.02));const paymentDeclines=pays.every((x,i)=>i===0||pays[i-1]>=x)&&pays[0]>pays[pays.length-1];const remainingDeclines=rems.every((x,i)=>i===0||rems[i-1]>x);return principalFlat&&paymentDeclines&&remainingDeclines;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__mortgageSet=(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const labelText=el=>Array.from(el.labels||[]).map(l=>l.innerText||'').join(' ');const meta=el=>[el.placeholder||'',el.name||'',el.id||'',el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',labelText(el)].join(' ').toLowerCase();const setVal=(el,val)=>{if(!el)return false;el.focus();el.value=String(val);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;};const inputs=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input'));const numeric=inputs.filter(el=>!['range','hidden','checkbox','radio','button','submit'].includes((el.type||'text').toLowerCase()));const price=numeric.find(el=>/price|house|total|房屋|房价/.test(meta(el)))||numeric[0];const rate=numeric.find(el=>el!==price&&/rate|interest|利率/.test(meta(el)))||numeric.find(el=>el!==price);const range=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type=range]')).find(el=>/down|首付/.test(meta(el)))||document.querySelector('input[type=range]');const term=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('select')).find(el=>/term|year|期限/.test(meta(el)))||document.querySelector('select');let ok=setVal(price,2000000)&&setVal(rate,4.2)&&setVal(range,30)&&!!term;if(term){const opts=Array.from(term.options||[]);const opt=opts.find(o=>String(o.value).trim()==='30')||opts.find(o=>/^\s*30\b/.test(o.textContent||''));if(opt){term.value=opt.value;term.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));term.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}else ok=false;}await sleep(500);return ok;})();return true;})()

(()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.visibility!=='hidden'&&s.display!=='none'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const controls=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],label,a')).filter(visible);const target=controls.find(el=>{const s=(el.innerText||el.textContent||'').trim();return /等额本金|fixed principal|^equal\s+principal$/i.test(s)||(/equal\s+principal/i.test(s)&&!/interest|p\s*&\s*i|本息/i.test(s));});if(!target)return false;target.click();return true;})()

(()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.visibility!=='hidden'&&s.display!=='none'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const row=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr')).filter(visible).map(tr=>Array.from(tr.cells).map(td=>td.innerText.trim()).join('|')).find(r=>(r.match(/\d/g)||[]).length>=5)||'';const nums=Array.from(row.matchAll(/-?\d[\d,]*(?:\.\d+)?/g)).map(m=>Number(m[0].replace(/,/g,'')));if(nums.length<5)return false;const payment=nums[1],principal=nums[2],interest=nums[3],remaining=nums[4];const close=(a,b,tol)=>Math.abs(a-b)<=tol;const paymentOk=close(payment,principal+interest,Math.max(2,Math.abs(payment)*0.01));const ratioOk=close(interest/principal,30*4.2/100,0.03);const remainingOk=close(remaining/principal,360-1,2.0);return paymentOk&&ratioOk&&remainingOk;})()

test_cases.name: Booking system exposes slots, booking fields, admin, cancel, and reminder controls

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase();const slots=(text.match(/\b(?:9|10|11|12|1|2|3|4|5)(?::00|:30)?\s*(?:am|pm)?\b/g)||[]).length>=8||document.querySelectorAll('button,td,[class*=slot]').length>=12;const availability=/available|booked/.test(text);const formText=[...document.querySelectorAll('input,textarea,select')].map(el=>[el.name,el.id,el.placeholder,el.getAttribute('aria-label')].join(' ').toLowerCase()).join(' ')+' '+text;const fields=['name','email','phone','service','notes'].filter(x=>formText.includes(x)).length>=4;const controls=['cancel','admin','reminder'].filter(x=>text.includes(x)).length>=3;const storage=/localstorage|saved|refresh|booking id|confirmation/.test(text);return slots&&availability&&fields&&controls&&storage&&!/\bundefined\b|\bnan\b|\[object object\]/i.test(text);})()

test_cases.name: Hover on list/card item shows highlight

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

prompt: 在一个HTML文件中创建内容管道看板。列：Idea、Draft、Review、Published、Archived。卡片：标题、内容类型（blog/video/podcast/social — 图标徽章）、作者、截止日期、字数目标、当前状态百分比。在列之间拖拽。列自动化：移动到Review触发"审核人分配"模拟。日历视图标签页，在月历上显示截止日期。分析：每周发布数量图表（4周）、内容类型分布饼图。批量操作：选择多个卡片、批量移动/归档。键盘快捷键：N=新建卡片，方向键导航。数据存储在localStorage。

test_cases.name: Content types
Content analytics chart is grounded

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const columns=['idea','draft','review','published'].every(w=>t.includes(w)); const content=/(blog|video|podcast|social|author|deadline|word|% complete|progress)/.test(t); const analytics=/(analytics|posts per week|content type|distribution|calendar)/.test(t); const chart=document.querySelectorAll('svg,canvas,path,polyline,rect,circle').length>=1||document.querySelectorAll('progress,[role=progressbar],[class*=progress]').length>=4; return columns&&content&&analytics&&chart;})()

Semantic HTML

prompt: 在一个HTML文件中构建一个设置和配置管理面板。侧边栏分区：General、Appearance、Security、Notifications、API Keys、Backup。General：站点名称、描述、language selector、timezone dropdown。Appearance：theme switcher（light/dark/auto with live preview）、primary color picker、logo upload placeholder、font size slider。Security：password requirements toggles（min length、uppercase、special chars）、2FA toggle、session timeout slider、IP whitelist CRUD。Notifications：email/push/SMS toggles per event type（sign up、order、error）。API Keys：generate new key（random string display）、list existing keys with created date and revoke button。Backup：last backup timestamp、backup now button（simulates with progress bar）、restore from file input。All settings saved to localStorage。Changes show unsaved indicator，每个分区底部有Save button。

test_cases.name: Sidebar sections
Settings sidebar lists General, Appearance, Security, Notifications, API Keys, and Backup

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); return ['general','appearance','security','notifications','api keys','backup'].every(x=>text.includes(x));})()

test_cases.name: Appearance section exposes theme, color, logo, and font-size controls together

steps.expression: (()=>{const link=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],a,li')].find(el=>/appearance/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(!link) return false; link.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const color=document.querySelectorAll('input[type=color]').length>=1; const range=document.querySelectorAll('input[type=range]').length>=1; return /light|dark|auto/.test(text) && /logo/.test(text) && color && range;})()

test_cases.name: Theme mode changes the live appearance state instead of remaining static

steps.expression: (()=>{const body=document.body; window.__r26_theme_before=(body.className||'')+'|'+(body.getAttribute('data-theme')||'')+'|'+getComputedStyle(body).backgroundColor; return true;})()

(()=>{const tab=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],a,li')].find(el=>/appearance/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(tab) tab.click(); const ctl=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],label,option')].find(el=>/dark|auto|light/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(!ctl) return false; ctl.click(); return true;})()
(()=>{const body=document.body; const now=(body.className||'')+'|'+(body.getAttribute('data-theme')||'')+'|'+getComputedStyle(body).backgroundColor; return now!==window.__r26_theme_before;})()

test_cases.name: Changing a security toggle creates an unsaved or changed-settings state

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r26_unsaved_before=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); return true;})()

(()=>{const tab=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],a,li')].find(el=>/security/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(tab) tab.click(); const ctl=document.querySelector('input[type=checkbox], [role=switch], [aria-checked]'); if(!ctl) return false; if(ctl.click) ctl.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); return text!==window.__r26_unsaved_before && (/unsaved|save changes|save/i.test(text) || document.querySelectorAll('button:enabled').length>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Backup Now starts a visible progress or completion state

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r26_backup_before=(document.body.innerText||''); return true;})()

(()=>{const tab=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],a,li')].find(el=>/backup/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(tab) tab.click(); const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a')].find(el=>/backup now|start backup|backup/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(!btn) return false; btn.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||''); const progress=document.querySelectorAll('progress, [role=progressbar]').length>=1; return text!==window.__r26_backup_before && (progress || /%|complete|completed|success/i.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Saving changed settings writes non-empty configuration into localStorage

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r26_admin_ls_before=JSON.stringify({...localStorage}); return true;})()

(()=>{const toggle=document.querySelector('input[type=checkbox], [role=switch], [aria-checked]'); if(toggle&&toggle.click) toggle.click(); const save=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a')].find(el=>/save/i.test((el.innerText||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||''))); if(!save) return false; save.click(); return true;})()
(()=>{const now=JSON.stringify({...localStorage}); return now!==window.__r26_admin_ls_before && now.length>2;})()

test_cases.name: localStorage stores data after interaction

steps.expression: (()=>{for(let i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){const v=localStorage.getItem(localStorage.key(i));if(v&&v.length>2)return true;}return false;})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个模态对话框组件。一个'打开模态框'按钮触发居中的模态覆盖层。模态框包含：标题、正文文字、'关闭'按钮和右上角X图标。点击遮罩背景也可关闭。平滑淡入动画。Escape键关闭。模态框打开时焦点锁定在内部。深色半透明遮罩。

test_cases.name: Accessibility basics
Modal action buttons change the visible modal state [tc_overlay_elements]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

test_cases.name: Rendered UI does not show undefined, NaN, or object placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个确认对话框组件, 单个HTML文件。按钮'删除项目'点击弹出确认框: 标题'确认删除', 正文'此操作不可撤销, 是否继续?', 两个按钮'取消'和'确认删除'(红色)。取消关闭对话框, 确认显示成功提示。遮罩层, ESC关闭, 淡入动画。

test_cases.name: 打开对话框
Delete flow opens a confirmation dialog with the required deletion warning copy [tc_05]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const trigger=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a,input[type=button],input[type=submit]')].find(el=>visible(el)&&/delete item|delete|remove|trash/i.test((el.innerText||el.value||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')));if(!trigger) return false;trigger.click();const dialog=[...document.querySelectorAll('[role=dialog],dialog,.modal,[aria-modal="true"]')].find(visible);if(!dialog) return false;const text=(dialog.innerText||dialog.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();return /confirm deletion|confirm/i.test(text) && /cannot be undone/i.test(text) && /continue|confirm delete|proceed/i.test(text);})()

test_cases.name: Accessibility basics
Prompt-grounded content remains intact after delay instead of only avoiding a crash [tc_content_persists]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["this action cannot be undone. do you wish to continue?", "confirm deletion", "cannot be undone", "confirm delete", "delete item", "success"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(true);})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个底部弹出Sheet组件, 单个HTML文件。3个演示: (1)操作菜单: 点击按钮从底部滑出操作列表(分享/收藏/举报/取消), 点击选项或遮罩关闭。(2)筛选面板: 底部弹出半屏高度面板, 含多个筛选条件(复选框+滑块+下拉), 确认和重置按钮。(3)详情预览: 底部弹出可拖拽高度的面板(拖拽手柄, 可拉到全屏), 显示内容详情。所有Sheet: 手势关闭(向下拖), 遮罩关闭, 弹簧动画。圆角顶部。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个带向导流程的模态框系统。'设置向导'按钮启动5步模态向导：第1步：欢迎（仅文字+下一步）。第2步：表单（3个字段+验证）。第3步：偏好设置（开关+下拉框）。第4步：审核（显示所有已输入数据）。第5步：完成（成功动画+CSS五彩纸屑效果）。模态框顶部进度点。每步有返回/下一步/跳过/完成按钮。第2步数据无效时不能前进。模态框功能：关闭确认（'有未保存的更改，确定离开？'）、键盘快捷键（Enter=下一步，Esc=关闭提示）、拖拽移动模态框（可拖拽标题栏）、调整模态框大小（角落拖拽手柄）、最小化按钮（缩小到角落小标签，点击恢复）。最小化期间所有状态保持。响应式：移动端全屏。深色主题带渐变强调色。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个下拉菜单组件。一个'选择选项'按钮切换显示6个选项的下拉列表。点击选项进行选择（按钮文字更新）。点击外部关闭下拉框。hover高亮选项。已选选项显示勾选标记。干净简约风格，带边框和阴影。

test_cases.name: Selecting an option updates the trigger and remains marked when the dropdown reopens

steps.expression: async()=>{const wait=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=s=>(''+(s||'')).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const clean=s=>norm(s).replace(/[✓✔]/g,'').trim();const trigger=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button]')].filter(visible).find(el=>/select option|select|option/i.test(norm(el.innerText||el.textContent)+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')))||[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button]')].filter(visible)[0];if(!trigger)return false;const initial=norm(trigger.innerText||trigger.textContent);if(!/select/i.test(initial))return false;trigger.click();await wait(300);const collect=()=>{const out=[];const seen=new Set();for(const el of [...document.querySelectorAll('li,[role=option],[role=menuitem],button,a,div')].filter(visible)){if(el===trigger||trigger.contains(el))continue;const t=clean(el.innerText||el.textContent);if(!t||t===clean(initial)||t.length>80)continue;if(!/option|choice|item|alpha|one|two|three|four|five|six|1|2|3|4|5|6/i.test(t))continue;const key=t.toLowerCase();if(seen.has(key))continue;seen.add(key);out.push({el,t});}return out;};let opts=collect();if(opts.length<6)return false;const chosen=opts[1]||opts[0];chosen.el.click();await wait(350);const after=norm(trigger.innerText||trigger.textContent);if(after===initial)return false;const labelUpdated=after.toLowerCase().includes(chosen.t.toLowerCase())||chosen.t.toLowerCase().includes(after.toLowerCase())||/option|choice|item|one|two|three|1|2|3/i.test(after);if(!labelUpdated)return false;trigger.click();await wait(300);const reopened=collect();const selectedRow=reopened.find(o=>o.t.toLowerCase()===chosen.t.toLowerCase()||o.t.toLowerCase().includes(chosen.t.toLowerCase())||chosen.t.toLowerCase().includes(o.t.toLowerCase()));const selectedState=selectedRow&&([selectedRow.el,...selectedRow.el.querySelectorAll('*')].some(n=>n.getAttribute('aria-selected')==='true'||n.getAttribute('aria-checked')==='true'||/selected|active|checked|current/i.test(n.className||''))||/[✓✔]/.test(selectedRow.el.innerText||selectedRow.el.textContent||''));const pageCheck=/[✓✔]/.test(document.body.innerText||'');return !!(selectedRow&&(selectedState||pageCheck));}

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个命令面板（Cmd+K风格）。按Ctrl+K或点击搜索图标打开居中覆盖层和搜索输入框。输入文字从30+项按分类（导航、操作、设置、帮助）分组的命令列表中过滤。每项：图标emoji、标签、键盘快捷键。方向键导航，Enter执行（显示toast通知），Escape关闭。最近命令章节（最近使用的5个，持久化到localStorage）。模糊搜索（匹配标签中任意位置）。过滤时加载状态。固定命令章节。结果计数。空状态消息。深色覆盖层带模糊遮罩。响应式。

Prompt-grounded content remains intact after delay instead of only avoiding a crash [tc_content_persists]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=[];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "details", "gte": 6}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(true)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Rendered UI does not show undefined, NaN, or object placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个垂直标签页组件。左侧边栏：5个标签标题垂直排列。右侧内容区显示选中标签的内容。当前标签有高亮背景。内容包括：文本、列表、代码块和图片占位符（每个标签各有不同）。响应式：移动端标签变为水平可滚动的药片按钮。内容淡入动画。支持键盘操作。

Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个嵌套Tab+手风琴组合, 单个HTML文件。顶层: 3个水平Tab(基础/高级/帮助)。每个Tab内容中有3-4个手风琴面板(点击展开/收起)。手风琴内容: 文字+列表+注意事项提示框。Tab之间的手风琴状态独立(切回保持之前展开状态)。搜索框: 输入关键词高亮匹配的手风琴标题并自动展开。紧凑的卡片式设计, 适合文档/设置场景。

test_cases.name: 3个Tab
状态保持

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个带分组手风琴的设置页面。6个设置分组：个人资料、通知、隐私、外观、语言、高级。每个分组展开显示3-5个设置项。设置类型：开关切换、下拉框、单选按钮、文本输入框、范围滑块。更改自动保存（localStorage）并显示'已保存'toast通知。每组有重置为默认按钮。搜索设置：输入过滤可见设置项。折叠的分组标题旁显示当前值。未保存更改指示器。深色主题可切换到亮色。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["3-5", "saved"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "input, select", "gte": 8}, {"selector": "details", "gte": 6}, {"selector": "input, select, textarea", "gte": 4}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个动态标签页管理器。功能：添加新标签（+按钮，提示输入名称）、关闭标签（每个标签上的X）、拖拽重新排序标签、双击标签重命名。标签溢出：超过6个时水平滚动并显示箭头按钮。每个标签内容是一个简单文本编辑器（textarea）。标签右键菜单：重命名、复制、关闭、关闭其他。固定标签（星号图标，固定的标签不能关闭且保持在左侧）。标签状态持久化到localStorage。当前标签指示器。键盘：Ctrl+T新建标签，Ctrl+W关闭，Ctrl+Tab切换。最多15个标签（超出显示警告）。Chrome风格标签栏外观。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["test content"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "[role=tab]", "gte": 4}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(true);})()

test_cases.name: Rendered UI does not show undefined, NaN, or object placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个全屏Hero轮播, 单个HTML文件。5张全屏幻灯片(不同渐变背景色)。每张: 大标题+副标题+CTA按钮。视差效果(文字和背景不同速度)。过渡效果: 交替使用(滑动/淡入/缩放)。缩略图导航栏在底部(5个小预览块, 当前高亮)。自动播放8秒/张+暂停按钮。键盘左右切换。触摸滑动。加载进度条。响应式文字大小。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个前后对比滑块。3组对比垂直排列。每组：两张图片（渐变占位符，不同颜色代表前后效果）叠加，中间有一条带手柄的垂直可拖拽分隔线。拖拽手柄左右移动，显示更多的一侧。两侧分别有'之前'和'之后'标签。方向切换：水平或垂直分割。自动动画按钮（滑块来回移动）。支持触摸。并排模式切换（移除滑块，两张图片并排显示）。缩放：滚轮缩放对比区域。每组全屏按钮。响应式。无障碍：键盘方向键移动滑块。

prompt: 创建一个消息提示组件, 单个HTML文件。3种类型按钮: 成功提示/错误提示/加载提示。成功: 绿色对勾+消息, 2秒后消失。错误: 红色叉号+消息, 需手动关闭。加载: 旋转图标+消息, 3秒后变为成功。从顶部滑入, 居中显示。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个通知中心。顶部栏有铃铛图标和未读数量标记。点击铃铛：下拉面板显示通知列表（8条预加载：3条未读加粗，5条已读）。每条通知：图标、标题、消息预览、时间戳。点击通知标记为已读（取消加粗，减少标记数量）。'全部标记为已读'按钮。清除全部按钮。按今天/昨天/更早分组。通知类型：消息（蓝色）、提醒（红色）、更新（绿色）、系统（灰色）。推送模拟：'模拟新通知'按钮添加一条通知并显示滑入的toast预览。持久化到localStorage。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个带操作的高级toast系统。toast类型：(1)简单：文字+自动消失。(2)带操作：'文件已删除。撤销？'带撤销按钮（点击恢复，显示'已恢复'toast）。(3)持久：保持到手动关闭，用于重要提醒。(4)带进度：显示上传进度0-100%持续3秒，然后显示'完成'。(5)多行：标题+描述+'了解更多'链接。位置选择器：右上/左上/右下/左下/上中/下中（6个单选按钮）。限制：最多显示5个toast（最旧的被移除）。动画：可配置滑动/淡入切换。声音开关（通过Web Audio播放点击音效）。历史：最近20条toast在可折叠日志中。每种类型的演示按钮。

prompt: 创建一个企业级通知系统, 单个HTML文件。通知渠道: 页内Toast+通知中心+桌面通知模拟(右下角弹窗)。Toast: 8种预设(成功/失败/警告/信息/加载中/确认对话/自定义HTML/带进度条)。通知中心: 右侧抽屉, 分组(今天/昨天/更早), 每条: 图标+标题+内容+时间+已读标记, 支持删除/全部已读/按类型筛选。桌面通知: 右下角小卡片(标题+正文+操作按钮), 5秒后自动收起但不消失(可点击展开)。通知规则: 可配置(设置面板)哪些类型触发哪种渠道。免打扰模式开关(静默所有通知, 仅存入通知中心)。声音开关(Web Audio提示音)。全部数据localStorage持久化。模拟: 每15秒自动产生一条随机通知。统计: 今日收到N条, 未读N条。深色企业风。

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个带分页和搜索的数据表格。50行产品数据（预填充）。列：ID、名称、分类、价格、库存、状态（有货/库存少/缺货）。功能：按名称搜索过滤、列排序、分页（每页10条）、每页行数选择器（10/25/50）。状态使用彩色标签。复选框选择行进行批量删除。导出CSV按钮。列显示/隐藏切换。

test_cases.name: Page renders
Column sort reorders visible product rows instead of only rendering table headers

steps.expression: (async()=>{const visible=e=>{if(!e)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(e),r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&+s.opacity!==0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0};const rows=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr,table tr,[role=row]')].filter(visible).map(r=>(r.innerText||r.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim()).filter(t=>/\d/.test(t)&&t.length>8);const before=rows();if(before.length<5)return false;const header=[...document.querySelectorAll('th,button,[role=columnheader],[role=button]')].filter(visible).find(e=>/price|stock|name|rating|inventory|价格|库存/i.test(e.innerText||e.textContent||''));if(!header)return false;header.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,500));const after=rows();return after.length>=5&&before[0]!==after[0]&&!/nan|undefined|\[object object\]/i.test((document.body.innerText||''));})()

test_cases.name: Search narrows the visible row set and keeps the query reflected in table state

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r27_table_rows_before=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length;const first=[...document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr td:nth-child(2), table tr td:nth-child(2), [role=row] [role=gridcell]:nth-child(2)')].map(el=>(el.innerText||'').trim()).find(Boolean)||'Product';window.__r27_table_query=first.split(/\s+/).slice(0,1).join(' ');return true;})()

(()=>{const input=document.querySelector('input[type=search], input[placeholder*=search i], input[type=text]'); if(!input) return false; input.value=window.__r27_table_query; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;})()

(()=>{const rows=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length;const text=(document.body.innerText||'');return rows<=window.__r27_table_rows_before && text.toLowerCase().includes(String(window.__r27_table_query||'').toLowerCase());})()

test_cases.name: Sorting changes the first visible row order rather than only toggling an icon

steps.expression: (()=>{const row=document.querySelector('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]');window.__r27_sort_before=row?(row.innerText||row.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():'';return true;})()

(()=>{const header=[...document.querySelectorAll('th,[role=columnheader],button')].find(el=>/price|stock|name/i.test(el.innerText||el.textContent||'')); if(!header) return false; header.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const row=document.querySelector('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]');const after=row?(row.innerText||row.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():'';return !!after && after!==window.__r27_sort_before;})()

test_cases.name: Pagination or rows-per-page changes the visible row count or the first visible page item

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r27_page_rows_before=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length;const row=document.querySelector('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]');window.__r27_page_first=row?(row.innerText||row.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():'';return true;})()

(()=>{const select=document.querySelector('select'); if(select && select.options.length>1){select.selectedIndex=Math.min(1,select.options.length-1); select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;} const next=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a,[role=button]')].find(el=>/next|>|page/i.test(el.innerText||el.textContent||'')); if(!next) return false; next.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const rows=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length;const row=document.querySelector('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]');const first=row?(row.innerText||row.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():'';return rows!==window.__r27_page_rows_before || first!==window.__r27_page_first;})()

prompt: 创建一个可编辑数据表格, 单个HTML文件。20行学生成绩数据(姓名/语文/数学/英语/总分/排名)。双击单元格可直接编辑(变为input)。自动计算总分和排名。条件格式: 分数>=90绿色, 60-89正常, <60红色。添加行/删除行按钮。排序: 点击表头。筛选: 按班级下拉。统计行: 底部显示平均分。数据存localStorage。

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个带行内操作的响应式数据表格。15行任务数据：任务名、负责人、优先级（高/中/低标签）、截止日期、状态（下拉框：待办/进行中/已完成）。行内编辑：点击单元格进入编辑。行操作：编辑按钮进入编辑模式、删除含确认、复制。拖拽重新排序行。列宽调整（拖拽列边框）。滚动时表头固定。行展开（点击箭头显示子任务详情）。移动端：卡片布局替代表格。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个4步结账表单。步骤：收货信息、支付信息、审核、确认。收货信息：姓名、地址、城市、省份下拉框、邮编、手机号。支付信息：卡号（每4位自动加空格）、有效期（MM/YY自动格式化）、CVV（3位数，掩码显示）、持卡人姓名。审核：订单摘要表格（3件商品含数量和价格）、收货地址显示、支付卡后4位。确认：动画对勾、订单号、预计送达时间。进度条。每步输入验证。桌面端始终显示汇总侧边栏。

prompt: 创建一个5步问卷调查表, 单个HTML文件。步骤: 基本信息/工作情况/生活习惯/满意度评价/提交确认。进度: 顶部百分比进度条(20%→40%→60%→80%→100%)。题型: 单选/多选/下拉/评分(1-5星点击)/文本框/滑块(1-10)。每步3-5题。必填标记。验证: 必填未填提示。上一步/下一步导航。最后一步: 预览所有答案(可点击修改跳转回对应步骤)。提交后: 感谢页面+统计(您的满意度在所有用户中排名前X%, 模拟数据)。暖色友好风格。

test_cases.name: Fill first required control then Next advances and progress updates

steps.expression: (()=>{const el=[...document.querySelectorAll("input, select, textarea")].find(x=>!x.disabled&&getComputedStyle(x).display!=="none"); if(!el) return false; if(el.tagName==="SELECT") { el.selectedIndex=Math.min(1, el.options.length-1); el.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:true})); return true; } if(el.type==="checkbox"||el.type==="radio") { el.click(); return true; } el.value=el.type==="range"?String(Number(el.min||0)+1):"filled"; el.dispatchEvent(new Event("input",{bubbles:true})); el.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:true})); return true;})()
(()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||"").toLowerCase();return /step|progress|%/.test(t);})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个动态表单构建器，带步骤预览。两个面板：左侧：表单构建器（拖放字段类型：文本、邮箱、手机号、下拉框、复选框、单选、日期、文件上传、评分、签名板）。右侧：以多步表单形式实时预览。构建器功能：拖拽重新排序字段、设置字段必填开关、添加占位文本、将字段分组到步骤中（拖拽分隔线）、条件逻辑（仅当字段A=特定值时显示字段B）、字段验证规则（正则表达式输入）。预览：将构建的表单渲染为步骤器，所有配置的步骤和验证均生效。导出表单配置为JSON。从JSON导入。3个预建模板（联系表单、求职申请、活动报名）。响应式。深色构建器主题。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=[];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "[draggable]", "gte": 6}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(true)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

prompt: 创建一个智能表单引擎, 单个HTML文件。JSON配置驱动: 表单结构由一个内置JSON配置定义(3个步骤, 每步4-6字段)。字段类型: 文本/数字/邮箱/电话/日期/时间/下拉(级联: 省→市→区)/多选/文件上传占位/签名板(canvas手写)/地址自动完成模拟/富文本简易编辑器。条件逻辑: 选择特定选项后显示/隐藏相关字段(如选择企业用户显示公司信息字段)。验证: 实时验证+提交验证, 自定义正则, 密码强度, 手机号格式。自动保存(每30秒存localStorage, 恢复提示)。多语言: 中英切换按钮。暗/亮主题切换。表单分析: 填写进度环形图, 每步耗时统计。提交后: 数据以JSON和表格两种格式显示。打印表单按钮。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个报税向导表单。6个步骤：个人信息、收入（多个收入来源：为雇主/自由职业/投资添加/删除行）、扣除项（分类复选框含金额：房贷、助学贷款、慈善捐赠、医疗）、抵扣（根据子女数量计算子女税收抵扣、教育抵扣）、审核（完整汇总含计算总额，可行内编辑）、提交（模拟提交含进度条）。税款计算引擎：总收入-扣除项=应税收入，适用税率阶梯（10%/12%/22%/24%/32%/35%/37%），减去抵扣=应纳税额或退税。与已预扣金额对比。显示实际税率。可视化：收入构成饼图、税率阶梯柱状图。保存/加载进度（localStorage）。打印税务摘要。每个字段有帮助tooltip。响应式。专业蓝灰色主题。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个聊天界面。消息区域显示3条预加载消息（你和机器人交替）。用户消息右对齐蓝色气泡，机器人消息左对齐灰色气泡。每条下方有时间戳。底部输入框和发送按钮。输入消息并点击发送（或Enter）添加为用户消息，清空输入框，自动滚动。1秒后模拟机器人回复。响应式，移动端全宽。

prompt: 创建一个客服聊天窗口, 单个HTML文件。右下角浮动按钮(圆形, 聊天图标), 点击展开聊天窗口。窗口: 顶部标题栏(客服名+在线状态绿点+关闭按钮), 消息区(2条欢迎消息), 输入框+发送按钮。发送消息后1秒自动回复固定文本。关闭按钮收起窗口回到浮动按钮。窗口有阴影和圆角。

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个消息应用界面。左侧面板：联系人列表（8个联系人含头像占位符、姓名、最后消息预览、时间戳、未读标记）。右侧面板：聊天区域。点击联系人加载该对话（每个联系人有不同的预加载消息）。发送消息。消息类型：文本、emoji选择器（20个emoji的网格，点击插入）、图片消息（占位符）。输入指示器动画（三个圆点弹跳）。已读回执（双勾标记）。在线/离线状态。搜索联系人。按日期分组消息。删除消息（右键或长按）。

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个群聊界面, 单个HTML文件。群名: 项目组(5人)。消息区: 不同成员的消息(不同颜色头像圆圈+昵称+消息气泡+时间)。预加载10条对话。发送消息: 文字+@提及(输入@弹出成员列表选择)。消息类型: 文字/系统消息(灰色居中: XX加入了群聊)/引用回复(长按消息选择回复, 引用原消息缩略)。群信息面板: 点击群名展开(成员列表+群公告+群文件占位)。消息搜索。新消息提醒(滚动到顶部时底部出现'N条新消息'按钮, 点击滚到底)。
