steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个AI聊天机器人界面。干净的居中聊天布局。顶部显示机器人头像和名称。欢迎消息含3个建议快捷回复按钮。用户发送消息后，机器人延迟1.5秒带输入指示器回复。机器人响应根据关键词变化（硬编码：问候→你好回复、帮助→功能列表、定价→方案信息、默认→通用回复）。消息历史可滚动。机器人消息支持简易Markdown（**加粗**、反引号代码渲染为样式化span）。每条机器人消息有反馈按钮（点赞/踩）。清除对话按钮。导出聊天为文本。深色AI主题（深色背景，绿色强调色）。

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};window.__r16_before_text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const field=[...document.querySelectorAll('textarea,input[type=text],input[placeholder]')].filter(visible)[0];if(field){field.focus(); field.value='r16 live message'; field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); field.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}const send=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a')].filter(visible).find(el=>/send|reply|post|message|chat|submit/i.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').trim()));if(send) send.click();else if(field){field.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Enter',bubbles:true}));}return true;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["1.5"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个Slack风格的消息应用。侧边栏：工作区名称、频道列表（5个频道带#前缀和未读计数）、私信（4个人带在线指示器）、添加频道按钮。主区域：频道标题栏（名称、话题、成员数、搜索）、按日期分组的消息时间线。功能：消息编辑器带格式工具栏（加粗、斜体、代码、链接、emoji、附件占位符）、消息回复线程（点击消息打开线程侧边栏）、表情回应（hover显示emoji反应栏，点击添加，显示计数）、固定消息、编辑自己的消息、删除含确认。@提及自动补全。频道设置模态框。键盘快捷键。用户状态（在线/离开/勿扰，带彩色圆点）。每个频道的通知偏好。深色Slack风格主题。响应式：移动端侧边栏折叠为汉堡菜单。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["test in channel", "testslackmsg"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个多功能聊天室, 单个HTML文件。功能: (1)多房间: 左侧3个聊天室(综合/技术/闲聊), 切换加载不同消息历史。(2)消息类型: 文字/代码块(```包裹自动格式化)/图片(占位缩略图, 点击放大)/文件(显示文件名+大小+下载按钮)/投票(创建投票: 标题+2-4选项, 其他人可投票, 显示实时结果条形图)。(3)用户系统: 5个模拟用户(不同头像颜色+昵称), 点击头像查看资料卡。(4)管理功能: 管理员标记, 置顶消息, 禁言用户模拟, 公告发布。(5)实时模拟: 每10秒自动产生一条其他用户的随机消息。(6)历史消息: 向上滚动加载更多(模拟分页)。(7)表情面板: 40个emoji分类(笑脸/手势/动物/食物)。数据存localStorage。深色Discord风格。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个客服在线聊天组件，带客服面板。通过标签切换两个视图：客户视图和客服视图。客户：浮动聊天按钮→打开组件→预聊天表单（姓名、邮箱、问题分类下拉框）→连接到客服→聊天含输入指示器、文件附件占位符、结束时的满意度评分。客服：仪表板含等待队列（3个等待中的聊天）、活跃聊天面板（点击在2个活跃对话间切换）、预设回复下拉框（5条预写回复，点击插入）、客户信息侧边栏（姓名、邮箱、历史记录）、转接给其他客服按钮、关闭/解决对话。双视图：实时消息同步（模拟：消息在两个视图中同时出现）。聊天记录导出。SLA计时器（响应时间追踪）。优先级标签。离线模式：切换后客户看到'留言'表单替代在线聊天。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个富文本编辑器。工具栏按钮：粗体(B)、斜体(I)、下划线(U)、删除线(S)、标题（H1/H2/H3下拉框）、无序列表、有序列表、文本对齐（左/中/右）、文字颜色（5个色板）、插入链接（提示输入URL）、撤销/重做。使用contenteditable div的可编辑区域。格式激活时工具栏按钮切换活跃状态。键盘快捷键：Ctrl+B粗体、Ctrl+I斜体、Ctrl+U下划线、Ctrl+Z撤销。下方显示字数和字符数统计。导出为HTML按钮。清除格式按钮。

test_cases.name: Export HTML
Prompt-grounded content remains intact after delay instead of only avoiding a crash [tc_08]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["hello bold text", "character", "word"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "button", "gte": 10}, {"selector": "button", "gte": 8}, {"selector": "button", "gte": 3}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Editing content visibly updates the editor view or preview [tc_custom_05]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

test_cases.name: Rendered UI does not show undefined, NaN, or object placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Editor preview, split view, or toolbar controls change visible state

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};window.__r16_before_text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const els=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a,[role=tab],label,summary,li,th,td,div')].filter(visible);const re=/split|preview|edit|markdown|toolbar|bold|italic|link|block|export/i;const target=els.find(el=>re.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').trim()))||els[0];if(target){target.click(); return true;}return false;})()
(()=>{const after=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();return after!==window.__r16_before_text;})()

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML
Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: ARIA roles present

steps.expression: document.querySelectorAll('[role], [aria-label], [aria-expanded], [aria-hidden]').length > 0

prompt: 创建一个代码编辑器, 单个HTML文件。特性: 代码区域(textarea/contenteditable), CSS语法高亮(关键字蓝色/字符串绿色/注释灰色/数字橙色), 行号显示(左侧), Tab键插入4空格(拦截默认行为), 自动缩进(回车后保持上行缩进), 括号自动补全(输入(自动补)), 查找替换(Ctrl+F弹出搜索框, 高亮匹配, 替换按钮)。语言选择下拉(JavaScript/Python/HTML, 切换高亮规则)。字体大小+-按钮。主题: 暗色Monokai风。代码行数统计。

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个Notion风格的块编辑器。内容由块组成。块类型：段落、标题（H1/H2/H3）、无序列表、有序列表、待办复选框、代码块、引用、分隔线、提示框（带图标的彩色框）、折叠（点击展开/折叠）。在空块开头输入'/'打开命令面板选择块类型。每个块左侧有拖拽手柄用于重新排序。点击块选中，显示浮动工具栏（粗体/斜体/链接/颜色）。Shift+点击多块选择。块操作菜单（⋮）：复制、删除、转换类型、上移/下移。撤销/重做。自动保存到localStorage。斜杠命令可搜索。页面标题可编辑。最后保存时间戳。导出为Markdown。深色主题带暖色调。

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__hd_live_export_token='hd live export token';window.__hd_blob_text='';const OldBlob=window.Blob;window.Blob=function(parts,opts){try{window.__hd_blob_text=(parts||[]).map(p=>''+p).join('\n');}catch(e){}return new OldBlob(parts,opts);};const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const fields=[...document.querySelectorAll('[contenteditable="true"],[contenteditable],textarea,[role=textbox]')].filter(visible).filter(e=>{const meta=((e.id||'')+' '+(e.className||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('placeholder')||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(e.closest('[class*=toolbar],[id*=toolbar],header,nav')?' toolbar ':'')).toLowerCase();return !/(title|search|command|slash|icon|toolbar|menu|palette|modal|markdown|output)/.test(meta);});const editable=fields.find(e=>e.closest('[data-block],[class*=block],[id*=block]'))||fields.find(e=>(e.innerText||e.value||'').trim().length>0)||fields[0];if(!editable)return false;editable.focus();if(editable.isContentEditable){editable.textContent=window.__hd_live_export_token;editable.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:window.__hd_live_export_token}));editable.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}else{editable.value=window.__hd_live_export_token;editable.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,inputType:'insertText',data:window.__hd_live_export_token}));editable.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}window.__hd_live_target=editable;return true;})()

(()=>{const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a,[role=button]')].find(e=>/export|markdown|\.md|md\b|download/i.test((e.innerText||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+' '+(e.title||'')+' '+(e.id||'')+' '+(e.className||'')));if(btn)btn.click();return !!btn;})()

(()=>{const token=window.__hd_live_export_token;let stored='';for(let i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){stored+=' '+localStorage.key(i)+' '+localStorage.getItem(localStorage.key(i));}const fieldText=[...document.querySelectorAll('textarea,input,[contenteditable]')].map(e=>(e.value||e.innerText||e.textContent||'')).join('
');const blob=String(window.__hd_blob_text||'');const body=(document.body.innerText||'');const exportedText=blob+'
'+fieldText+'
'+body;const exported=exportedText.includes(token);const markdownSyntax=exportedText.includes('# ')||exportedText.includes('```')||exportedText.includes('- ')||exportedText.includes('- [')||exportedText.includes('> ')||exportedText.toLowerCase().includes('.md')||exportedText.toLowerCase().includes('markdown');return stored.includes(token)&&exported&&markdownSyntax;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{localStorage.clear();const el=document.querySelector('[contenteditable],textarea,[role=textbox],input');if(!el)return false;el.focus();if(el.isContentEditable){el.textContent='hd persistence token';el.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input',{bubbles:true,data:'hd persistence token'}));}else{el.value='hd persistence token';el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));}return true;})()

(()=>{let stored=false;for(let i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){const v=localStorage.getItem(localStorage.key(i));if(v&&/hd persistence token|block|title|editor/i.test(v))stored=true;}const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();return stored&&/undo|redo|last saved|saved|autosave/.test(text);})()

prompt: 创建一个在线简历编辑器, 单个HTML文件。左侧: 编辑面板(表单式编辑各区块: 个人信息/教育/工作经历/技能/项目)。右侧: 实时简历A4预览(随左侧编辑实时更新)。功能: 添加/删除经历条目, 拖拽排序区块顺序, 3个简历模板切换(经典/现代/极简, CSS样式不同), 照片上传占位, 技能条拖拽调整百分比, 导出为PDF(打印对话框), 自定义颜色主题(主色调颜色选择器), 自动保存localStorage, 中英文切换。预览支持缩放(滑块)。打印时只打印预览区。

test_cases.name: 编辑面板
Typing a unique token in the editor updates the A4 preview immediately

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r27_editor_token='R27 Resume Token';window.__r27_editor_before=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();return true;})()

(()=>{const input=document.querySelector('input[type=text], textarea, input:not([type]), [contenteditable=true], [contenteditable]'); if(!input) return false; if(input.tagName==='TEXTAREA'){input.value=window.__r27_editor_token; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;} if(input.isContentEditable){input.innerText=window.__r27_editor_token; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); return true;} input.value=window.__r27_editor_token; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;})()
(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();return text!==window.__r27_editor_before && text.includes(window.__r27_editor_token);})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const body=document.body;window.__r27_template_before=(body.className||'')+'|'+getComputedStyle(body).backgroundColor+'|'+getComputedStyle(body).fontFamily;return true;})()

(()=>{const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=tab],[role=button],label')].find(el=>/Classic|Modern|Minimal/i.test(el.innerText||el.textContent||'')); if(!btn) return false; btn.click(); return true;})()
(()=>{const body=document.body;const now=(body.className||'')+'|'+getComputedStyle(body).backgroundColor+'|'+getComputedStyle(body).fontFamily;return now!==window.__r27_template_before;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["john doe"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "input, textarea, select", "gte": 6}, {"selector": "button", "gte": 3}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个协作白板绘图工具。基于Canvas的绘图画面。工具：画笔（自由绘制）、直线、矩形、圆形、橡皮擦、文字（点击添加文本框）、选择（点击选中并移动图形）。颜色选择器（12色+自定义）、画笔粗细滑块（1-20px）、透明度滑块。图层面板：添加/移除/重排/切换可见性/重命名图层。撤销/重做（最近50次操作）。网格切换。对齐到网格。缩放（鼠标滚轮，50%-400%）带平移（空格+拖拽）。导出PNG。保存/加载到localStorage。键盘快捷键（B=画笔，E=橡皮擦，R=矩形，C=圆形，L=直线，T=文字，Ctrl+Z撤销）。角落小地图。图形属性面板（选中时：位置、大小、颜色、透明度）。深色工具栏UI，白色画布。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个电子表格公式编辑器。20×10的可编辑单元格网格。单元格引用系统（A1-J20）。公式栏：选中单元格时在顶部栏显示其公式/值。支持公式：=SUM(A1:A5)、=AVG(B1:B3)、=COUNT(C1:C10)、=IF(A1>10,"是","否")、=A1+B1、=A1*2、基础算术运算。单元格依赖：修改一个单元格自动重新计算依赖单元格。错误显示：无效公式显示#ERROR，循环引用显示#REF。单元格格式化：粗体切换、文本对齐、数字格式（2位小数）、单元格背景色。列宽调整（拖拽表头边框）。插入/删除行列。冻结窗格（首行+首列始终可见）。单元格范围选择（点击+拖拽高亮范围，状态栏显示SUM/AVG/COUNT）。复制/粘贴单元格（Ctrl+C/V含公式调整）。命名范围。条件格式化：高亮超过阈值的单元格。撤销/重做。导出CSV。自动保存。深色Excel主题。

test_cases.name: Formula bar
Status bar SUM
Export CSV
Mobile layout preserves prompt-grounded content instead of only a viewport tag [tc_11]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input,textarea,select,[role=button],[role=tab],summary')].filter(visible).length;const panels=[...document.querySelectorAll('dialog,[role=dialog],[role=tabpanel],menu,ul,ol,table,article,section,[role=listbox],[role=grid]')].filter(visible).length;return controls>=2&&(panels>=1||document.querySelectorAll('[aria-expanded],[aria-selected]').length>=1);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["20x10", "10,", "count", "yes", "sum", "avg"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Spreadsheet renders 20x10 grid with formula bar and row/column export controls

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=="none"&&s.visibility!=="hidden"&&parseFloat(s.opacity||"1")>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=s=>String(s||"").replace(/\s+/g," ").trim();const body=document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||"";const lower=norm(body).toLowerCase();const cells=[...document.querySelectorAll("body *")].filter(visible).map(el=>norm(el.innerText||el.textContent||"")).filter(Boolean);const exact=new Set(cells);const cols=["A","B","C","D","E","F","G","H","I","J"].filter(x=>exact.has(x)).length;const rows=Array.from({length:20},(_,i)=>String(i+1)).filter(x=>exact.has(x)).length;const textCols=/a\s*b\s*c\s*d\s*e\s*f\s*g\s*h\s*i\s*j/i.test(body)||/abcdefghij/i.test(body);const textRows=/1\s*2\s*3\s*4\s*5\s*6\s*7\s*8\s*9\s*10\s*11\s*12\s*13\s*14\s*15\s*16\s*17\s*18\s*19\s*20/.test(body);const hasGrid=((cols>=10&&rows>=20)||(textCols&&textRows));const formulas=/\bfx\b|formula|sum:|avg:|count:/.test(lower);const ops=/insert row|ins row|\+row|\+ row/.test(lower)&&/insert col|ins col|\+col|\+ col/.test(lower)&&/export/.test(lower);const gridSurface=document.querySelectorAll("tr").length>=21&&document.querySelectorAll("td,th").length>=220||[...document.querySelectorAll("td,th,[class*=cell],[class*=grid],[id*=grid],[class*=spreadsheet],[id*=spreadsheet]")].filter(visible).length>=80;return hasGrid&&formulas&&ops&&gridSurface;})()
